original_image_tags: Infrared sensor still (BHOT/WHOT mode) showing a crosshair reticle with a central vertical line and horizontal scale marked from -15 to +15. A small, dark, circular object is visible just above the horizontal axis, slightly to the right of the central vertical line (near the +2 position on the horizontal scale). The background is a uniform gray tone. The bottom left corner displays the timestamp "12/31/99 18:10:18". The image contains multiple redaction blocks.

elements.description: A black-and-white, grainy photograph featuring a central crosshair reticle with horizontal and vertical scale markings (numbers 5, 10, 15). A single small black dot is visible just above the horizontal line near the center. Seven black rectangular redaction bars are placed over various areas of the image. A timestamp in the bottom left corner reads '12/31/99 18:10:18'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual elements: a grainy black-and-white image, a central crosshair reticle, a single small dark object/dot just above the horizontal line near the center, seven redaction bars, and the same timestamp '12/31/99 18:10:18'; the differences (e.g., Description A specifying horizontal scale markings -15 to +15 vs. B listing 5, 10, 15; A calling it an 'infrared sensor still' vs. B a 'grainy photograph') represent added detail or slight categorical variation without direct contradiction on the visual substance or quoted text.
